EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for Facebook leads at the fourth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Facebook Lead (Admiral)_4th Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: We still require information to complete your insurance quote
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve been unable to reach you since you provided your details via our Facebook form.
This means I’ve been unable to provide you with the business insurance quote you requested.
If you are interested in proceeding with your quote, just let me know the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
